message:
feat: complete environment configuration system and agent support

- Add agent interface for AI coding agents (claude, codex, gemini)
- Default API key proxying: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY
- Auto-mount .codex and .gemini config directories if they exist
- Enhanced --help with config file locations and container info
- Tests for environment variable substitution system
- Config flags override default env var proxying
- Clean foundation for adding more AI agents

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,17 @@ var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
 	Use:   "packnplay",
 	Short: "Launch commands in isolated Docker containers",
 	Long: `packnplay runs commands (like Claude Code) inside isolated Docker containers
-with automated worktree and dev container management.`,
+with automated worktree and dev container management.
+
+Configuration:
+  Config file: ~/.config/packnplay/config.json
+  Credentials: ~/.local/share/packnplay/credentials/
+  Worktrees:   ~/.local/share/packnplay/worktrees/
+
+Default container: ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
+  Includes: Node.js, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini, GitHub CLI
+
+Supported AI agents: claude, codex, gemini`,
 }
 
 func Execute() {

@@ -112,14 +112,15 @@ var runCmd = &cobra.Command{
 		}
 
 		runConfig := &runner.RunConfig{

-			Verbose:     runVerbose,
-			Runtime:     runtime,
-			Command:     args,
-			Credentials: creds,
+			Path:           runPath,
+			Worktree:       runWorktree,
+			NoWorktree:     runNoWorktree,

+			Runtime:        runtime,
+			Command:        args,
+			Credentials:    creds,
+			DefaultEnvVars: cfg.DefaultEnvVars,
 		}
 
 		if err := runner.Run(runConfig); err != nil {
